title: Politician To Fight Elections For 3 Parties In Gujarat? Nomination Filed For BJP, Congress And AAP!
description: In a bizarre development ahead of Gujarat local body elections, a politician named Bharat Singh Vakhala has filed nominations as candidate for three parties - Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), Congress and the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) - for the Pipero seat of Dahod District Panchayat.
